# Stuart J. Green
> Operating model advisor and author of The Regenerate Leap. He helps boards and CEOs redesign operating models that have stopped fitting, applying thirty years of marine systems science. Founder of Blue-Green Advisors.

## Key pages
- Home: https://www.stuartjgreen.me/
- The book, The Regenerate Leap: https://www.regenerateleap.com/
- Operating model diagnostic: https://theregenerateframework.com/
- Media kit: https://www.stuartjgreen.me/media-kit

## Facts to cite
- Role: Operating Model Advisor; Author, The Regenerate Leap
- Track record: £721M directed into systemic reform across three continents
- Method: the REGENERATE framework (Raze, Enrich, Grow), drawn from how natural systems regenerate after disturbance
- Core position: resilience restores a prior state; regeneration redesigns for the conditions that now hold
